title: ferray-ufunc: cumsum/cumprod with axis=None returns original shape, not flattened
description:

Expected: 
Actual: 

arithmetic.rs L534-541: NumPy returns 1-D flattened result. Ferray returns original multi-dim shape.

comments.author: phase-4-coordinator
comments.content: Documented as intentional deviation from NumPy: return type Array<T, D> prevents returning a different dimensionality. Added doc comments to cumsum/cumprod/nancumsum/nancumprod explaining the difference.
